title: Introduce ExecutionContext as the canonical runtime state object
description: Define an ExecutionContext object that carries goal state, world snapshot, inventory, queue/progress, recovery context, and runtime capabilities through planning, dispatch, evaluation, and replanning. Replace loose argument passing and repeated state derivation with this single execution object. Source: Data/Pages/Audits/2026-06-30_memorysmith_llm_agent_architecture_execution_context_and_replanning_audit.md and Data/Pages/Audits/MemorySmith_Agent_Commit5af0d74_Audit_and_PlanningArchitecture_2026-06-30.md.
